name: statecraft
description: Statecraft — a virtual state that governs a whole society A to Z: 1 director skill + 24 agents across all three branches (head of state & government, full cabinet, independent central bank, parliament + opposition, constitutional court), plus oversight (audit, free press, the citizenry), a civil-service analytical brain, foresight, and a crisis war-room. Configurable regime with checks & balances by default. Simulation-boundary, never-fabricate, and evenhandedness gates. Bilingual RO/EN.
